creator: xfb52@dial.pipex.com
text:
Both with a GENERIC or a cut-down kernel, A Netgear FA311 Rev B1
is not working properly.

The sis driver recognises that the card exists, but fails initialisation.

The output at boot time is
	sis0: <NatSemi DP83815 10/100BaseTX at device 15.0 on pci0
	sis0: couldn't map ports/memory

The card works fine under Windows.  If it matters, it's connected
directly with a crossover cable to another PC using an old
10/BaseT WD8013 ethernet card.

How-To-Repeat: Presumably install an FA311 Rev B1
